summary: Iter 33 — Retest of BookingFlow.jsx outstation fix (artist.city -> artist?.profile?.city). ALL frontend outstation UI blocks + ack gate + admin editable notice + booking snapshot verification PASS end-to-end. 16/16 UI checks green + 2/2 booking snapshots correct (is_outstation True for Delhi event, False for Mumbai event) + admin PUT/GET/UI render round-trip works.
critical_code_review_comments: BookingFlow.jsx is now 751 lines — consider splitting into per-step subcomponents (Step1Package, Step2Schedule, Step3Details, Step4Review, Step5Payment, Step6Success). Would improve testability + reduce cognitive load. Not blocking.

The outstation-notice text and review-outstation-notice text are duplicated in JSX (lines 419-422 vs 543-546). Extract into a helper `formatOutstationNotice(template, artistCity, eventCity)` to keep them in sync if admin edits placeholder tokens.

The disable predicate on step4-next (line 560-563) inlines the same city-mismatch check used at lines 406 and 533. Extract to a memoized `isOutstation` boolean at component scope to eliminate 3 duplicated string ops (trim().toLowerCase()) per render cycle.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (16/16 outstation UI checks + 2/2 booking snapshot verifications + admin edit round-trip)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@booktalent.com/Admin@123; Customer: customer@booktalent.com/Customer@123; Artist Priya (Mumbai): priya@booktalent.com/Artist@123; Payment OTP: 123456
seed_data_creation: Created two live bookings under customer account: BT-260717-CE27D1 (outstation Mumbai->Delhi, is_outstation=True) and BT-260717-DBB2D1 (same-city Mumbai, is_outstation=False). Also BT-260717-CE27D1's confirmation flow completed via mock OTP 123456. These live in the customer's real booking list — status 'pending_artist'. Prefixed venue/name with TEST_ for identifiability. No admin setting left mutated (custom outstation_notice was set for UI verification then restored to default).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 32 frontend fix is fully verified. All 5 references to artist?.profile?.city work correctly. Booking snapshots persist is_outstation, artist_city, event_city. Admin outstation_notice edit is live-editable via PUT /api/admin/settings/outstation_notice and rendered by BookingFlow on load. Two TEST_ prefixed live bookings exist in customer's list (BT-260717-CE27D1 outstation, BT-260717-DBB2D1 same-city) — leave them or clean up if concerned about pending_artist queue noise.
